title: Pregnancy Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
Internet]. Kenilworth (NJ): Merck & Co. Inc.; c2025. Pregnancy Test and Due Date; [updated 2021 May; cited 2025 Sep 3]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://www.merckmanuals.com/home/women-s-health-issues/normal-pregnancy/detecting-and-dating-a-pregnancy 
Nemours KidsHealth [Internet]. Jacksonville (FL): The Nemours Foundation; c1995-2025. Getting a Blood Test; [reviewed 2021 Sep; cited 2025 Sep 03]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://kidshealth.org/en/parents/blood-tests.html

Pathology Tests Explained [Internet]. Alexandria (Australia): Australasian Association for Clinical Biochemistry and Laboratory Medicine; c2025. HCG (Human chorionic gonadotropin); [Reviewed 2023 Jun 1; cited 2025 Sep 3]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://pathologytestsexplained.org.au/learning/test-index/hcg
